stub: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white working class background.
constituency: She is from a constituency that is not your constituency.
personalization: She frequently speaks out and votes against her party leadership.
substantive: She opposes increased funding for the NHS.
justification: In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background).
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “If I lose an election doing what I think is right, then so be it.”
text: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white working class background. She is from a constituency that is not your constituency. She frequently speaks out and votes against her party leadership. She opposes increased funding for the NHS. In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background). Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “If I lose an election doing what I think is right, then so be it.”
